title: Packaging Corporation of America's (PKG) CEO Mark Kowlzan on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE:PKG ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 26, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Mark Kowlzan – Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Tom Hassfurther – Executive Vice President, Corrugated Products Bob Mundy – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants George Staphos – Bank of America Securities Mike Roxland – Truist Mark Wilde – Bank of Montreal Mark Weintraub – Seaport Research Partners Adam Josephson – KeyBanc Capital Markets Phillip Ng – Jefferies Gabe Hajde – Wells Fargo John Tumazos – John Tumazos Very Independent Research Cleve Rueckert – UBS Kyle White – Deutsche Bank Operator Thank you for joining the Packaging Corporation of America's Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Results Conference Call. Your host today will be Mark Kowlzan, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of PCA.

title: Packaging Corp (PKG) Earnings & Sales Beat Estimates in Q2
text: Packaging Corp (PKG) delivers impressive Q2 bottom-line results on higher volume and improved price and mix in the Packaging segment.

title: Packaging Corp. (PKG) Beats Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Packaging Corp. (PKG) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 12.54% and 4.91%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Packaging Corporation of America Reports Second Quarter 2022 Results
text: LAKE FOREST, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE: PKG) today reported second quarter 2022 net income of $301 million, or $3.20 per share, and net income of $304 million, or $3.23 per share, excluding special items. Second quarter net sales were $2.2 billion in 2022 and $1.9 billion in 2021. title: Packaging Corporation of America Schedules Conference Call to Discuss Second Quarter 2022 Operating Results
text: LAKE FOREST, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE: PKG) will hold a conference call on Tuesday, July 26, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss second quarter 2022 results. The conference call leader will be Mark Kowlzan. Second quarter earnings results will be released after the market closes on Monday, July 25, 2022. To access the conference call, you may pre-register for the conference by navigating to https://dpregister.com/sreg/10168404/f3743c256c. Once you have registered, you will receive your dial-in number. When dialing in the day of the call, please ask to join the Packaging Corporation of America earnings call. If you prefer not to pre-register, you may dial in the day of the call using these toll free numbers: 866-777-2509 (U.S.), 866-605-3852 (Canada) or 412-317-5413 (International) by 8:45 a.m. (Eastern Time). Please ask to join the Packaging Corporation of America earnings call. A replay of the call will also be available from July 26, 2022 until August 9, 2022. To access the recording, please dial toll free 877-344-7529 (U.S.), 855-669-9658 (Canada) or (412) 317-0088 (International). The replay Access Code is: 5521985 This call will also be webcast and accessible at PCA’s website at www.packagingcorp.com. Please go to the Investor Relations tab/Current Events. PCA is the third largest producer of containerboard products and a leading producer of uncoated freesheet paper in North America. PCA operates eight paper mills and 90 corrugated products plants and related facilities.
